blended.narrative: Stratton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
